headline: DuPont Aramids Sale Reshapes Portfolio And Raises Valuation Questions
summary: DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) has completed the divestiture of its Aramids business to Arclin. The deal includes the well known Kevlar and Nomex brands and marks a shift in DuPont's business mix. The transaction proceeds, a note receivable, and a retained equity interest reshape DuPont's financial profile. For you as an investor, this move means DuPont is reshaping its role in specialty materials and chemicals, with Aramids now housed at Arclin. DuPont is placing more attention on areas such...
